user.title: Connect to Antminer
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Antminer miner.

data_description.host: The local IP address or hostname of your miner, e.g. 192.168.0.223
data_description.password: Default password is 'root' unless you have changed it

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Antminer. Check the IP address and port.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.
